Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.StringValidator

Packages that use StringValidator
Package
Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static StringValidator

    Validates the requirements of a String.
    StringValidator

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return StringValidator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asBigDecimal(Consumer<BigDecimalValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asBoolean(Consumer<BooleanValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asInetAddress(Consumer<InetAddressValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asInteger(Consumer<IntegerValidator<Integer>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asLong(Consumer<IntegerValidator<Long>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asShort(Consumer<IntegerValidator<Short>> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asString()
    Deprecated.
    actual is already a String
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asUri(Consumer<UriValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.asUrl(Consumer<UrlValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.contains(String expected)
    Ensures that the actual value contains a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.doesNotContain(String value)
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.doesNotEndWith(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not end with a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.doesNotStartWith(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not start with a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.endsWith(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value ends with a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isBlank()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty or contains only white space codepoints.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isNotBlank()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty or contains non-white space codepoints.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isStripped()
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain leading or trailing white space, where white space is defined by strip().
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.isTrimmed()
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain leading or trailing white space, where white space is defined by trim().
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.length(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.startsWith(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value starts with a value.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.strip()
    Strips white space from the beginning and the end of the actual value, where white space is defined by the Unicode standard.
    StringValidator
    StringValidator.trim()
    Removes all white space from the beginning and end of the actual value, where white space is defined as any character whose codepoint is less than or equal to 'U+0020' (the space character).
    StringValidator
    DefaultJavaRequirements.validateThat(String actual, String name)
     
    StringValidator
    JavaRequirements.validateThat(String actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a String.
